summary: Full UI interaction test completed for iteration 72. CRITICAL BUG FIXED: POST /api/orientation/daily-answer was returning 500 error due to 'today_str' variable scoping issue. After fix, the complete user flow works: base selection → daily question → answer submission → TrustChangeCard + InlineInviteCard appear. All 14 backend tests pass. Both FRESH and COMPLETED user flows verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIXED: /app/backend/routes/orientation.py line 1551 - 'today_str' variable was only defined inside nested conditional (mission direction match), but used unconditionally on line 1636 in ai_interpretation call. Fixed by defining today_str at function scope.

fresh_user.state: Used for full flow testing - base selection + action completion

completed_user.state: Has base=heart and action completed today, shows TrustChangeCard + InlineInviteCard on page load

verified_ui_flow.STEP_2_base_selection: PASS - DailyBaseSelection with data-testid='daily-base-selection' renders, base options clickable
verified_ui_flow.STEP_3_base_confirm: PASS - data-testid='base-confirm-btn' appears after selection, POST /api/orientation/daily-base fires, data-testid='daily-base-confirmed' appears
verified_ui_flow.STEP_4_question_appears: PASS - data-testid='daily-orientation-question' renders with question text and answer button
verified_ui_flow.STEP_5_answer_click: PASS - data-testid='daily-answer-button' click triggers POST /api/orientation/daily-answer successfully (BUG FIXED)
verified_ui_flow.STEP_6_trust_card: PASS - data-testid='trust-change-card' appears with trust score after action completion
verified_ui_flow.STEP_7_invite_card: PASS - data-testid='inline-invite-card' appears with PH-xxxxx invite code
verified_ui_flow.STEP_9_collapsed_sections: PASS - data-testid='toggle-atmosphere-section' and 'toggle-community-section' exist and are clickable
verified_ui_flow.STEP_10_network_requests: PASS - GET /api/invites/me fires when InlineInviteCard loads
verified_ui_flow.STEP_11_retention_nudges: PASS - data-testid='retention-nudges' appears with mission + globe nudges, NO invite nudge
verified_ui_flow.STEP_12_backend_apis: PASS - All orientation and trust APIs return correct response structures

verified_apis.GET /api/orientation/daily-base/{user_id: 200 - returns base_selected state and base options
verified_apis.POST /api/orientation/daily-answer/{user: 200 - BUG FIXED - now returns success, impact_message, streak, ai_interpretation
verified_apis.GET /api/orientation/field-dashboard: 200 - returns field narrative and dominant direction

bug_fix_details.issue: POST /api/orientation/daily-answer/{user_id} returning 500 error: 'cannot access local variable today_str where it is not associated with a value'
bug_fix_details.root_cause: In /app/backend/routes/orientation.py, 'today_str' was defined only inside the 'if mission.get("direction") == suggested_direction' block on line 1555, but was referenced on line 1636 in the ai_interpretation DB query regardless of mission match.
bug_fix_details.fix_applied: Moved 'today_str = now.strftime("%Y-%m-%d")' to be defined at function scope (line 1551) before the conditional block, ensuring it's always available.
bug_fix_details.verification: API now returns 200 with full response including ai_interpretation. Full user flow works end-to-end.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Core user flow fully verified. Bug fix applied to /app/backend/routes/orientation.py. All 12 test steps pass. TrustChangeCard and InlineInviteCard now correctly appear both for fresh users (after completing action) and for completed users (on page load via useEffect callback). RetentionNudges correctly shows only mission, globe, return nudges - NO invite nudge. Collapsed Atmosphere and Community sections work correctly.

mocked_apis.note: All APIs use real database operations and LLM integrations
